creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-i386->mav

Hi, can you have a look at this? you might know most about this code 
at this moment in time, to explain the error (Might be bad media, or as the 
submitter suggests improper burning of the ISO file, but I want to have 
expert eyes to confirm :-)).
